mapper.sql: INSTANCE_ID AS "instanceId", PROPERTY_GROUP_ID AS "propertyGroupId", PROPERTY_ID AS "propertyId", PROPERTY_VALUE AS "propertyValue", PROPERTY_DESC AS "propertyDesc", CUR_VERSION AS "curVersion"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM FWK_WAS_PROPERTY WHERE INSTANCE_ID = #{instanceId} ORDER BY PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, PROPERTY_ID

SELECT wp.INSTANCE_ID as "instanceId", wp.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID as "propertyGroupId", wp.PROPERTY_ID as "propertyId", wp.PROPERTY_VALUE as "propertyValue", wp.PROPERTY_DESC as "propertyDesc", wp.CUR_VERSION as "curVersion", COALESCE(p.DEFAULT_VALUE, 'USE_DEFAULT') as "defaultValue", p.PROPERTY_NAME as "propertyName", p.DATA_TYPE as "dataType" FROM FWK_WAS_PROPERTY wp LEFT JOIN FWK_PROPERTY p ON wp.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = p.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID AND wp.PROPERTY_ID = p.PROPERTY_ID WHERE wp.INSTANCE_ID = #{instanceId} ORDER BY wp.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, wp.PROPERTY_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_WAS_PROPERTY ( INSTANCE_ID, PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, PROPERTY_ID, PROPERTY_VALUE, PROPERTY_DESC ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{propertyGroupId}, #{propertyId}, #{propertyValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{propertyDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: MERGE INTO FWK_WAS_PROPERTY T USING ( SELECT #{instanceId} AS INSTANCE_ID, #{propertyGroupId} AS PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, #{propertyId} AS PROPERTY_ID FROM DUAL ) S ON ( T.INSTANCE_ID = S.INSTANCE_ID AND T.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = S.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID AND T.PROPERTY_ID = S.PROPERTY_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.PROPERTY_VALUE = #{propertyValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, T.PROPERTY_DESC = #{propertyDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (INSTANCE_ID, PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, PROPERTY_ID, PROPERTY_VALUE, PROPERTY_DESC) VALUES (#{instanceId}, #{propertyGroupId}, #{propertyId}, #{propertyValue, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{propertyDesc, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: SELECT wi.INSTANCE_ID, wi.INSTANCE_NAME, #{propertyGroupId} AS PROPERTY_GROUP_ID, #{propertyId} AS PROPERTY_ID, NVL(wp.PROPERTY_VALUE, 'NO DATA') AS PROPERTY_VALUE, wp.PROPERTY_DESC, CASE WHEN wp.INSTANCE_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS HAS_EXISTING_DATA FROM FWK_WAS_INSTANCE wi LEFT JOIN FWK_WAS_PROPERTY wp ON wi.INSTANCE_ID = wp.INSTANCE_ID AND wp.PROPERTY_GROUP_ID = #{propertyGroupId} AND wp.PROPERTY_ID = #{propertyId} ORDER BY wi.INSTANCE_ID
SELECT INSTANCE_ID AS instanceId, INSTANCE_NAME AS instanceName FROM FWK_WAS_INSTANCE ORDER BY INSTANCE_ID
